invalid.contradicts: The spark claims Taoism named this mechanism '300 years before computers existed.' Taoism (Tao Te Ching, ~4th century BCE) predates electronic computers (1940s) by roughly 2,300+ years, not 300 years.
invalid.reasoning: The stated temporal gap is factually wrong by an order of magnitude; a verifiable date/duration error sends the card to INVALID regardless of the real concept it references.
